name: Yext Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
product_overview_description:
Yext is an all-in-one tool that supercharges local SEO for businesses. It keeps your information accurate and consistent across directories, search engines, and social media, boosting your local search visibility. Yext also offers review monitoring and response features, helping you engage with customers and manage your reputation. Plus, its white-labeling capabilities let you brand the tool as your own. This comprehensive approach drives more traffic and potential customers to your locations, making a significant impact for businesses aiming to excel locally.

Source: G2

Features of Yext 

  • Has a wide publishers network of 200+ directories, search engines, and more
  • Comes with a comprehensive listings analytics tool
  • Offers a fully customizable dashboard for reporting
  • Extensive features like AI assistants such as Google Gemini and Bing Co-pilot 
  • Users receive proactive listing recommendations with actionable insights to improve their listing performance
  • Helps monitor, analyze, and report customer sentiment and engagement to improve CSAT (Customer Satisfaction) scores.
  • Respond to reviews and feedback consistently to improve your ranking on SERPs
  • Comes with AI-powered review insights 
  • Generative review responses help you respond to more reviews in a short period
  • Supports Yext pages, a toolkit to build web pages at scales 
  • Helps you scale your network and content on multiple social media platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, Linkedin, and more. 
  • Comes with multi-location posting features to help post on several platforms at once 
  • Has Yext Chat, a conversation AI tool specifically created for Enterprises 

Pros 

✅Enhance your website or app with a powerful search tool that quickly and accurately answers users' questions, improving user satisfaction and engagement.

✅Helps you easily view and filter your analytics data however you want 

✅Offers a very smooth user interface with minimal to no glitches 

✅The tool is completely API-enabled 

Cons

❌The prices are exorbitant and not suitable for SMBs or Startups

❌While migrating from Yext, users might lose a big chunk of data and will have to start from scratch

❌The customer support is not very good and is inaccessible most of the time

❌Users complain that most of the data they provide via analytics is untrustworthy

❌Does not provide Local analytics for Keyword Rank Tracking

Pricing Module

Yext offers a range of pricing options, billing customers every week, though typically billed annually. However, users have noted that these prices can fluctuate, making them potentially unreliable in the long term, with annual bills sometimes ending up significantly expensive.
